name: Starks Law, PC
description_short: Starks Law, PC is a Pennsylvania-based bankruptcy and consumer debt defense law firm with 2 offices serving all 67 PA counties since 2017.
description_long: Starks Law, PC was incorporated in 2017 and has grown to operate 2 offices across Pennsylvania while serving all 67 counties in the state. The firm specializes in bankruptcy representation and consumer debt defense, helping clients navigate legal challenges related to debt collection lawsuits, consumer debt issues, and related financial matters. According to their website, the firm combines modern technology with legal expertise, positioning themselves as a technology-forward law practice that emphasizes transparency and client communication. Their team consists of multiple attorneys with over 40 years of combined experience in the practice areas they serve. The firm distinguishes itself through several operational features: a dedicated client portal providing real-time case updates, flexible payment plans for qualifying practice areas, emphasis on responsive communication, and multi-attorney case handling. Their online reputation reflects these commitments—the website displays over 74 five-star client reviews highlighting professional service, quick resolution, and strong communication. Client testimonials specifically reference successful debt collection defense, favorable judgments, and representation against creditor lawsuits. However, the website content is primarily marketing-focused and does not provide detailed information about specific bankruptcy chapter offerings (Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13), fee structures, success rates, or substantive legal methodologies. The firm appears to serve both individuals facing debt collection actions and those considering formal bankruptcy protection, though the exact scope of bankruptcy services versus debt defense services is not clearly delineated on the homepage.
pros: Covers all 67 Pennsylvania counties with 2 physical offices
Over 40 years of combined partner experience
Client portal for real-time case updates and transparency
Flexible payment plans available for qualifying practice areas
74+ verified five-star client reviews with consistent praise for communication and professionalism
Multi-attorney approach ensures cases receive adequate attention
Responsive communication emphasized in multiple client testimonials
cons: Website lacks specific information about Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13 bankruptcy differences or firm focus
No published fee schedules, retainer costs, or pricing transparency despite claiming transparency as core value
Limited detail about specific bankruptcy services—website emphasizes debt defense/collection cases more than bankruptcy filing assistance
No information about attorney credentials, bar standings, or relevant bankruptcy law certifications
Client reviews appear to focus primarily on debt collection defense rather than bankruptcy representation
best_for: Pennsylvania residents facing debt collection lawsuits seeking legal defense
Individuals considering bankruptcy protection with preference for multi-attorney representation
Clients prioritizing ongoing communication and case transparency through digital portals
Those seeking flexible payment arrangements for legal services
diagnosis: Starks Law, PC is best suited for Pennsylvania residents who need bankruptcy representation or defense against debt collection lawsuits and value responsive attorney communication and digital case management tools. The main caveat is that the firm's website emphasizes consumer debt defense more prominently than bankruptcy services specifically, and lacks detailed information about bankruptcy chapter options, fees, or specific bankruptcy experience—making it advisable for prospective clients to directly contact the firm to clarify bankruptcy service scope and expertise before engagement.
services: Client portal access for case updates
Statewide Pennsylvania legal coverage across all 67 counties
